vocab.meaning: trí tưởng tượng không giới hạn/tự do
vocab.example: With my unfettered imagination, I could transform a simple cardboard box into a sophisticated spaceship.
Looking back at my childhood games feels like revisiting a bygone era before smartphones dominated our lives.

vocab.meaning: trò chơi kỳ ảo/đầy sự ngẫu hứng
vocab.example: We often engaged in whimsical play, creating complex storylines for our stuffed animals and action figures.

vocab.meaning: năng lượng dồi dào/không giới hạn
vocab.example: Armed with boundless energy, my friends and I would play tag until the sun dipped below the horizon.
I realize now that building complex LEGO structures was instrumental in my early cognitive development.

vocab.meaning: những chuyến tham quan/dã ngoại ngoài trời
vocab.example: Short outdoor excursions to the nearby creek were the highlight of my summer holidays as a young boy.
I still hold vivid memories of my father teaching me how to fly a kite on the windy hills behind our house.
My artistic inclinations were evident early on, as I would spend hours sketching mythical creatures in my notebook.

vocab.meaning: những năm tháng hình thành nhân cách/nền tảng
vocab.example: Reading fairy tales during my formative years instilled in me a lifelong love for literature and storytelling.

vocab.meaning: sự thoát ly thực tại thuần túy
vocab.example: Playing hide-and-seek offered a sense of pure escapism, where my only worry was finding the perfect concealment.
